meta.title: Capello Salon and Suites | Hair Salon | Beauty Salon | Women's Boutique | Birdie Boutique | Greenville, SC | Downtown Greenville, SC
meta.description: Helping women feel confident with expert color, scalp care + boutique finds. Luxury Hair & Scalp Lounge in Greenville, SC. Family-owned salon serving the Greenville community for over 20 years.
meta.keywords: hair salon, beauty salon, balayage, foilayage, hair color, scalp lounge, boutique, Greenville SC, downtown Greenville, extensions, bridal hair

logo.descripcion: Logo de Capello Salon and Suites

secciones.contenido: Hair Salon | Beauty Salon | Women's Boutique | Birdie Boutique | Greenville, SC | Downtown Greenville, SC. Helping women feel confident with expert color, scalp care + boutique finds.

imagenes.descripcion: Vista exterior del salón Capello en 102 Mills Ave, Greenville SC

secciones.contenido: A preferred salon located in downtown Greenville & Travelers Rest, SC. For over 20 years, our team has been creating effortlessly beautiful hair for the Greenville community. Family-owned and operated with a reputation for a welcoming atmosphere, exceptional hair care and pleasing customer service experiences. Both Capello salons are very classy and clean.

Specialty color services including hand painting, balayage, foilayage, highlighting and lowlighting. Precision short and long haircuts, dimensional color, perms, and chemical straightening. Haircutting for the entire family, the latest in color techniques as well as extensions and other chemical services. Barbering, bridal services, blowouts, and facial waxing. 55 services available across Hair, Waxing, and Hair Extensions categories.

The Capello Scalp Lounge offers targeted solutions for scalp health, thinning hair, and hair loss through advanced trichology-based treatments. Luxurious head spa treatments, scalp facials, and head massages for relaxation and rejuvenation. A new spa-like scalp lounge at locations in Greenville or Travelers Rest.

Birdie is a boutique nestled into the walls of the salon, offering jewelry, baby blankets, purses, candles, hair accessories and tote bags to little girls hair bows. Complimentary gift wrap available.
Owner: Chelsea McBride. Team members include Jamie, Hannah, Courtney, Lindsey, Debi, Autumn, Heather, Olivia, Billy, Lilly, Susannah, Robin, and Chelsea. Apprentice program also available.

5.0 rating across all categories (Venue, Punctuality, Value, Service) on Vagaro. 12 reviews on Yelp. Clients frequently commend Capello Salon for its talented staff who provide excellent service quality.
Online booking available through Vagaro. Walk-ins also accepted.
